title.rendered: How Companies Are Marketing For The Environment

content.rendered: Many people believe that the big companies that are making commitments on the environment are green washing, and just faking it for good press. Billy Cripe, VP of Marketing at CIBO, and David Reske, CEO of Nowspeed talk about how nothing could be further from the truth. Here is a front row seat to see how big companies are investing in better agricultural practices to help farmers lower their carbon footprint and to reduce their impact on climate change. In this interview Billy speaks first-hand about massive investments companies are making to improve the environment and the sincerity of the people behind the dollars. Listen to this insightful conversation to learn more about how regenerative agriculture is changing the world!
